meta.title: NeoWriter — Calm writing, conserved.
meta.description: A calm, local-first plain-text writing app for iOS, macOS and HarmonyOS NEXT. Autosave, version history, trash, backups and conflict-safe sync — your words, protected.

hero.subtitle: NeoWriter is a fast, local-first plain-text editor that treats your words as something to protect — with autosave, version history, trash, backups and conflict-safe sync. On iPhone, iPad, Mac and HarmonyOS NEXT.

mockup.title: On Conservation
mockup.line1: The words a writer trusts to a device should
mockup.line2: outlast the device itself. When sync sees two
mockup.line3: valid histories, both should survive. When a
mockup.line4: draft changes, the previous state stays

platforms.label: One writing space, everywhere
platforms.title: Native on every device you write with.
platforms.subtitle: Built platform-native — never a web wrapper. The same conservation-of-writing invariants carry across each edition.

ios.name: iOS & iPadOS
ios.description: iPhone and iPad first. Keyboard-aware editor, three-column iPad workspace, Shortcuts, Widgets and Handoff.

macos.name: macOS
macos.description: A true Mac app that shares the same model, storage and sync-safety core — no Catalyst shortcuts, no compromise.

harmony.name: HarmonyOS NEXT
harmony.description: A fully native HarmonyOS NEXT edition on the Stage model — same no-data-loss guarantees, no cross-platform runtime.

conservation.label: Conservation of writing
conservation.title: Your words
conservation.description: Every keystroke autosaves locally. Every meaningful edit snapshots a version you can roll back to. Deleted articles rest in Trash for 30 days. When the system is uncertain, it preserves more text — never less.

markdown.label: Markdown mode
markdown.title: Markdown that reads
markdown.description: Type bold, italic, or code and the markers fade from lines you've left, so the page reads like it's published. Move the caret back and they return, ready to edit. Headings, quotes, lists, tables and code all render inline.

history.label: Version history
history.title: Roll back to any
history.description: Visible version history captures previous states before every meaningful change. Restore an older draft and the version you replaced is kept as a newer recovery snapshot — recovery is a path, not a gamble.

sync.label: Conflict-safe sync
sync.title: Two histories?
sync.description: NeoWriter runs no backend. Sync goes through your own iCloud or any WebDAV server you trust. When two devices diverge, the incoming version is saved as a conflict copy — your text is never silently overwritten.

platforms.label: Truly cross-platform
platforms.title: Write here,
platforms.description: iPhone, iPad, Mac and HarmonyOS NEXT — each a native app, each carrying the same conservation guarantees. Start a draft on the train, finish it at your desk, keep it safe the whole way.

grid.title: Everything a serious writer needs.
grid.subtitle: Quiet by default — powerful when you reach for it.

privacy.title: No accounts. No servers.
privacy.subtitle: NeoWriter runs no backend. Your writing lives on your device — and only travels through the cloud you choose.

local.title: Local-first by design
local.description: Your library lives on your device. Editing, autosave, history and Trash never depend on a network or an account.

yourCloud.title: Your cloud, your rules
yourCloud.description: Sync through your own iCloud or any WebDAV server — Nutstore, Nextcloud, ownCloud, your own box. Your text never sits in a database it doesn't have to.

noTracking.title: Zero tracking
noTracking.description: No analytics, no ads, no third-party SDKs. NeoWriter does not collect personal data. Period.

conflict.title: No silent overwrite
conflict.description: When sync sees two valid histories, both survive as a conflict copy. The app preserves competing edits instead of choosing for you.

pricing.title: Fair pricing. Safety is never behind a paywall.
pricing.subtitle: Autosave, history, Trash, backups and conflict protection are always free.

footerCTA.title: Start writing today.
footerCTA.subtitle: Free to use. No account needed. Your words stay yours.
